reasoning: We are predicting if an investment-grade bond index effective yield will be higher on three future resolution dates compared to an initial date roughly a week before the first resolution date. Corporate bond yields follow an approximate random walk over short horizons. However, long-term the expectation converges toward a generic base rate distribution of rate movements. Thus, uncertainty should increase with the forecast horizon, pulling the probabilities for the later resolution dates closer to the 50% neutral baseline.
